title: Season-two opening and route clarity phase
summary: Fortieth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-1 wave reopens progression after the first season close by adding one calm season-two opening through the existing station and map seams, then tightening active-outing discoverability across the station, journal, and world map.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a compact second-season opening and High Pass launch handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The first season now closes cleanly, but the next season still needs one obvious, calm opening.

execution_order.goal: Implement the second-season opening pass through the current station and map seams.
execution_order.why_now: The game should feel ready to continue instead of subtly stalling after the archive state.

execution_order.goal: Review the second-season opening for clarity and restraint.
execution_order.why_now: The opening should feel singular and inviting without becoming a new planner surface.
Mission clarity is still delicate enough that the next systems gain should help players relocate their current outing.

execution_order.goal: Strengthen active-outing visibility across the station, journal, and world map.
execution_order.why_now: The current game already has the right surfaces; they just need to reinforce the same route more consistently.
The active outing should become easier to relocate after a break without creating a denser HUD.

guardrails: Do not add a new top-level station page.
Do not add a larger quest log or navigation HUD.
Reuse the current strip, footer, board, and journal seams whenever possible.
acceptance_focus: The game has one calm second-season opening instead of a stalled archive state.
The active route is easy to relocate through the existing station, journal, and map surfaces.
Lane 1 stays progression-focused without growing a dashboard.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-season-two-opening-and-route-clarity-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as the next lane-1 systems wave: open the second season through existing seams, then make the active outing easier to relocate across the station, journal, and world map without adding a larger planner shell.
